entries.d: Moving on shoes with small wheels on the bottom
entries.s: We went _____ in the park and it was so much fun!

entries.d: A man or woman who does sport, often for a job
entries.s: She is a famous _____ who has won many prizes.

entries.d: Sliding down a white mountain on one wide board
entries.s: I tried _____ for the first time and fell many times!

entries.d: Sliding down a white mountain using two long boards on your feet
entries.s: We go _____ in the Alps every winter holiday.

entries.d: Standing on a board and riding waves in the sea
entries.s: _____ looks amazing but it is hard to stay on the board.

entries.d: Going up very high rocky land using ropes and your body
entries.s: _____ is exciting but can be very tiring because you go up very high rocky land.

entries.d: Standing on a board with a sail and moving over water
entries.s: My uncle loves _____ on the lake in summer.

entries.d: Moving through water using your arms and legs
entries.s: _____ is great exercise. Moving through the water uses your whole body.

entries.d: Riding a bike on rough paths and hills
entries.s: We went _____ in the hills and got very dirty.

entries.d: Riding a bicycle from one place to another
entries.s: I go _____ to school every day. It takes ten minutes.

entries.d: Riding a small board with wheels under your feet
entries.s: He learned _____ when he was ten and now he does tricks on his board with wheels.

entries.d: To get bigger and become an adult
entries.s: I want to be a pilot when I _____.

entries.d: A person who belongs to a group or a team
entries.s: She is a _____ of the school basketball team.

entries.d: Doing something as a job, not just for fun
entries.s: He wants to become a _____ football player one day.

entries.d: A competition to see who can go the fastest
entries.s: I came first in the running _____ at sports day!

entries.d: Important and not funny, or very bad
entries.s: Luckily, the accident was not _____. Nobody got hurt.

entries.d: To be seen or to come into view
entries.s: A rainbow _____ in the sky after the rain stopped.

entries.d: An event where people try to win
entries.s: Our school won first prize in the singing _____ last month.

entries.d: Something new and hard that you must try to do
entries.s: Learning to ride a bike was a big _____ for me.

entries.d: How far it is from one place to another
entries.s: The _____ from our house to the school is two kilometres.

entries.d: Very, very strong or far from normal
entries.s: Bungee jumping is an _____ sport that not everyone likes.

entries.d: A lot of water that covers land that is usually dry
entries.s: After three days of rain, there was a terrible _____.

entries.d: To be able to do something, even if it is hard
entries.s: I _____ to finish all my homework before dinner.

entries.d: Agreed on and accepted by the people in charge
entries.s: The _____ start time of the match is three o'clock.

entries.d: A little bit, quite
entries.s: The water in the pool was _____ cold today -- not freezing, but not warm either.

entries.d: To swim with a tube so you can look under water
entries.s: We _____ in the clear blue sea and saw lots of fish.

entries.d: To join in and do something with other people
entries.s: She _____ in the school play last year and acted the main role.

entries.d: Not having something, missing something
entries.s: I went to school _____ my lunch box today.

entries.d: The best result ever for something in the whole world
entries.s: He broke the _____ for the 100-metre sprint.

entries.d: The number zero in a game or match
entries.s: Our team won the football match three to _____.

entries.d: By yourself, with nobody else
entries.s: I did my homework all _____. Nobody helped me at all.

entries.d: To get a point or a goal in a game
entries.s: She _____ two goals in the football match today.

col.prompt: Which does NOT go with SCORE?

entries.d: To try to take the ball from another player in a game
entries.s: He _____ the other player and won the ball back.

entries.d: Something that uses your time but gives you nothing good
entries.s: Watching that film was a _____. It was so bad.

entries.d: The things you need to do a sport or job
entries.s: You need a helmet and knee pads — that's the _____ for skating.

entries.d: When you do well and reach what you wanted
entries.s: The school play was a big _____. Everyone loved it and the audience clapped for five minutes.
